title: gentianella lutescens
intro: Gentianella lutescens, also known as yellow gentian or lesser yellow gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its bitter compounds, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gentianella lutescens include its potential to aid digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Gentianella lutescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties.
